name: Miyu Shinohara
description:
Shinohara Miyu, known as Fukaziroh in ALfheim Online and Gun Gale Online, is one of the main characters in the Gun Gale Online spin-off series. She is a long-time friend of Kohiruimaki Karen from her hometown Hokkaido in the real world. She plays ALfheim Online as a Sylph but occasionally converts her account to Gun Gale Online to participate in Squad Jam tournaments.

Taking advantage of her high strength, she fights with two six-barreled grenade launchers in GGO.
